title: Refactor: Migrate to TypeScript
original_text: Refactored codebase to TypeScript. Added type definitions for all modules. Implemented strict type checking. Added type guards and utility types. Updated build pipeline for TypeScript compilation. Result: TypeScript migration complete.
expected_body_lines: - Add type definitions for all modules
- Add type guards and utility types
- Update build pipeline for TypeScript compilation
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(types): migrate codebase to TypeScript"
